title: Weixin Empowers Local Businesses with Mini Program and Payment Solutions Ahead of Visit Malaysia 2026
summary: Malaysian businesses tap Weixin ecosystem to capture booming Chinese visitor spending.

title: Games for Change and Tencent Games Expand Raising Good Gamers with New Program to Help Families Navigate Positive Play in Video Games
summary: Games for Change today announced the launch of a new program.

title: Tencent Malaysia Secures "Malaysia Digital" Status, Strengthening Local Capabilities to Advance Regional Innovation
summary: Tencent’s subsidiary, WeChat Malaysia Sdn. Bhd., has been awarded “Malaysia Digital” (MD) status by the Malaysia Digital Economy Corporation (MDEC).

title: Tencent Announces 2025 Annual and Fourth Quarter Results
Tencent and City University of Hong Kong Launch “WeTech Academy Principals’ AI Open Class x Tencent AI Campus Tour”
summary: Tencent has partnered with the City University of Hong Kong (CityU) to host the inaugural “WeTech Academy Principals’ AI Open Class x Tencent AI Campus tour”.

title: DBS Bank and TenPay Global Launch Service Providing Instant DBS Remit Transfers to Weixin Pay
summary: DBS customers can now send money instantly to Weixin Pay, the digital RMB wallet within Weixin/WeChat, connecting to over a billion Weixin and WeChat users.

title: HeritageSG and Tencent Launch Wonderbot 2.0, Transforming Learning at Children's Museum Singapore
summary: WonderBot 2.0 debuts at Children’s Museum Singapore as part of a three-year digital heritage commitment by Tencent.

title: OCA and Tencent Esports Launch Decade-Long Strategic Partnership to Forge a New Era for Asian Esports
summary: Tencent Esports and the Olympic Council of Asia (OCA) jointly announced a comprehensive ten-year strategic partnership.

title: Tourism Malaysia and Weixin Pay Formalize Strategic Collaboration to Enhance Travel Experience
summary: Tourism Malaysia and Weixin Pay today agreed to a Memorandum of Collaboration aimed at supporting the sustainable growth and digital transformation of Malaysia’s tourism industry,

title: Tencent MIDAS and Mastercard Launch Global Collaboration to Transform Digital Commerce
summary: Tencent MIDAS and Mastercard have announced a new collaboration to accelerate the future of digital commerce for the global entertainment ecosystem.
